lines.text: Central Perk, Joey, Ross, Monica and Phoebe are there as Chandler enters

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (excited) Guys, guys, I've got great news! Guess what...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, ah, Monica's pregnant?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (shocked) Really? (She looks around, suddenly embarrassed) Let's get past the moment.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What's your news?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Thank you. I got a job in advertising. (Everybody cheers)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (hugging Chandler) Oh, honey, that's incredible!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (inquisitive) Gosh, what's the pay like? (Everybody stares at her indignantly) Oh, come on people... (defending) come on, now, if I don't know who makes the most, how do I know who I like the most! (She looks at Joey) Hey Joey! (Joey winks at her)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Actually, it pays nothing. It's an internship.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, that's cool. We have interns at 'Days Of Our Lives'.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Right. So, it'll be the same except... less sex with you. (Joey nods)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So, uh, what kinda stuff do you think they'll have you do there?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, it's a training program, but at the end, they hire the people they like.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (enthusiastic) That's great.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, I mean, there's probably gonna be some ground work which will probably stink, you know, grown man getting people coffee is a little humiliating
At the same time, Gunther puts down a cup of coffee in front of Chandler

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (grinning awkwardly) Humiliating and noble!
Gunther shoots a nasty look at him while leaving

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You know, if I didn't already have a job, I think, I would have been really good in advertising.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ross, you did not come up with "got milk?"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yes, I did, I did! (He turns to Joey, disappointed) I should have written it down!
Opening Credits
Monica and Chandler's Aparment, Monica sits at the table

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Where's Chandler? I wanna wish him good luck on his first day. (Monica smiles) ... and I smelled bacon. (taking some)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He just left.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (puzzled) Who did? (Monica looks bewildered)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) Joey! You never gonna believe it: she called.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (standing up, surprised) She did?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (enthusiastic) You got it!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (still surprised) I did?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What is she talking about?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I don't know, but it sounds great.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Your agent called. You got that audition.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: With Lennart Haze?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my god, that is great! That is *** for a play on broadway... and in a real theatre, not that little one underneath the dally like last time.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Is it a good play?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, it must be, because I read and I didn't understand a singe word.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, and Lennart Haze is starring in it...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, and directing.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (sighs) He was so good in that movie of MacBeth.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (disbelieving) You saw that?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, but... I saw the previews. They played it right before Jackass.

lines.speaker: Rachel and Joey
lines.text: (pointing at Monica, a look of recognition in their faces) Ah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, he's done some amazing works.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, yeah. Oh, I loved him in those cell phone commercials.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (almost laughing) I know. When the monkey hits him in the face with that giant rubber phone. (They all laugh)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey! Maybe the monkey will be at the audition!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (sitting down) Don't make me more nervous than I already am!
Chandler's new workplace, his fellow interns are already seated around a table

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering) Good morning, everybody.

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: Can I get you a cup of coffee, Sir?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, no, no, I'm an intern, just like you guys... except for the tie, the briefcase... and the fact that I can rent a car.

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: Seriously, you're an intern?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, well, I'm kinda heading into a new career direction and, you know, you gotta start at the bottom.

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: (shaking his head disbelievingly) Dude!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Right. Look, I know I'm a little bit older than you guys, but it's not like I'm Bob Hope (he sits down)
Everybody gives him an inquiring look

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The comedian? USO?!

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: (correcting him) Uhm, it's USA, sir.
Chandler desperately covers his head in his hands
Audition room, Joey is lead into the room by a receptionist in a fancy dress

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: This is Joey Tribbiani. Joey, these are the producers and, as you probably already know, this is Lennart Haze.
Lennart Haze turns around in his chair to face Joey

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It is so amazing to meet you. (They are shaking hands) I'm such a big fan of your work.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Well, I've... I've been blessed with a... a lot of great roles.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Tell me about it! "Unlimited nights and weekends!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: You making fun of me? Because I am not a sell-out. (He stands up and walks menacingly towards Joey) I didn't do that for the money, I believe in those phones. I almost lost a cousin because of bad wireless service.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No, I-I-I wasn't making fun of you, honestly, I-I think you were great in those commercials.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Well, I do bring a certain credibility to the role.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (regaining confidence) Are you kiddin'? When they shoot you out of that cannon...

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Peeeeeooooooooch (He mimes flying out of the cannon) "Hang up that phone!" One take!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: So, shall we read?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, yah, sure.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Top of act two. This is my entrance. You got it?
Joey nods whereupon Lennart acts as if he is entering a room

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "What the hell are you still doing here"?
Joey stares at him, fascinated by his performance

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Err, "I think you know".

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "Bastard"!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "I am what you made me. You know what? I could go right now."

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "Go, go!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "I can't. Oh, I want to, long pause, but I can't."

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: I'm sorry, sorry. You're not supposed to say "long pause"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (understandingly) Oh, oh, I thought that was your character's name, you know, I thought you were like an Indian or something, you know with a... (He mimes wearing a feather on his head)

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: No. Thank you so much for coming in. We appreciate it, thank you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah, y-y-you're sure you don't want me to do it again? I could do it with an accent, you know, Southern (He speaks in what he believes is a Southern accent) "I could go right now, maaan!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: (stunned, muttering) My god in heaven.
The producers stand up
Producer #1: Joey, hang on for a second. Lennart, can we talk to you for a moment?
They stand aside, talking

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: You, you gotta be kidding. See, h-he, he can't act. (Joey hears that and his disappointment is reflected in his facial expression).
Producer #1 whispers something

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Hey! I-I-I don't care if he's hot, you know. If you want to sleep with him, do it on your own time. (Joey smiles smugly at this) This is a play. No, listen: if you insist on this, I will call my agent so fast on a cell phone that has a connection that is so clear he's gonna think I'm next door.
Joey approaches them

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (interrupting their conversation) Ah, hi, ah. Thank you so much for whispering for my benefit, but, ah, look, if you just tell me what I did wrong, I'd just love to work on it and come back and try it again for you. And, and also: (to Producer #1) 'How you doing?' (to Lennart again) You should, please, just gimme another chance. I really wanna get better, please.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Well, if you wanna come back at the end of the day today, here are my notes. Ready?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Uhm, you're in your head. You-you're thinking way too much.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I really doubt that.

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: (explaining to Joey, who nods fervently) No, no, no. It's that you're not connected with anything in your body. There's no urgency. The scene is a struggle, uhm, it's a race. Also, what you did was horizontal. Don't be afraid to explore the vertical. And don't learn the words. Let the words learn you.
Joey ponders on this for a while

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (suggesting) Couldn't I just sleep with the producer?
Backstreet, Ross and Phoebe walking

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, do you wanna go to dinner tonight?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I can't. I've got a date with that waitress, Katy, yeah, I know we've been only going out like twice, but I have a really good feeling about her.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, I hear divorce bells.
A mugger, his face hidden by a cap, approaches them from behind

lines.speaker: Mugger
lines.text: Alright. Just give me your wallets and there won't be a problem.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (taken aback) What?

lines.speaker: Mugger
lines.text: I have a gun (It looks like he has a gun under his coat)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: O-ok. Just relax, Phoene, just stay calm. (He searches his coat and freaks out). Oh my god, I can't find my wallet.
He finally finds the wallet and hands it to the mugger

lines.speaker: Mugger
lines.text: Alright, lady, now give me your purse!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (still in a high-pitched voice) What do you mean "no"? I knew you'd be my death, Phoebe Buffay.
A sign of recognition runs across Phoebe's face

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Lowell, is that you?

lines.speaker: Lowell
lines.text: Phoebe? (He lifts his cap) Oh my god!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (simultaneously) Oh my god!
They hug and scream

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (excited) I'm sorry, Ross, this is my old friend Lowell from the streets. Lowell, Ross.

lines.speaker: Lowell
lines.text: Ross, nice to meet you. (He stretches his hand out to him)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, a real pleasure.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ah, it's been so long, so long. (They hug again) I can't believe you're still doing this!

lines.speaker: Lowell
lines.text: Ough, I know, but I quit smoking!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good for you!

lines.speaker: Lowell
lines.text: So you look like you're doing really well! I guess you're mugging days are behind you?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ouh... (she nods)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked) Oh my god. Phoebe, you used to mug people?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Excuse me, Ross, old friends catching up...
Monica and Chandler's Apartment, Monica sits on the couch as Joey enters

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, how did the audition go?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, they wanna see me again this afternoon, but, err, well, Lennart Haze did not like me. (He sits down)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What happened?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, he said I wasn't urgent enough, you know, and that everything I did was horizontal and I should be more vertical. Oh, and he said that I should think less.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So far so good! (Joey nods)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering, carrying a large box) Honey, I'm old!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (standing up, walking towards him) What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I am so much older than these other interns. I can't compete with them.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So you're a little older. Try to look at the positive: You have all this life experience.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, but I don't think life experience with these. (He opens the box and takes an inline skate-like sneaker out)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wooooooooow (He takes the sneaker) It's like they're on fire!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are they? (They sit down again)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: They're these prototype sneakers and come up with ideas on how to sell them which I can't do because no self-respecting adult would ever where these.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (determined) I give you $ 500 for them!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What am I supposed to do with these?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ah, come on, sneakers are easy. You wear sneakers all the time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, first of all, they're not called "sneakers" anymore. Apparently, they're called "kicks" or "skids" and I think I heard somebody say "slorps". (He takes a sneaker) And here, look: they've got these wheels to pop out from the bottom so you can roll around 'cause, apparently, walking is too much exercise. Kids, kids, roll your way to childhood obesity! (to Monica) Would you help me try to sell these?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, have you considered using a girl with huge knockers?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, I don't think that's the kinda thing they're looking for.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, that'd work on me! Why did I get to buy Mrs. Butterwords?
Central Perk, Monica sits on the couch as Phoebe and Ross enter

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey, hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, you'll never guess what just happened... Phoebe and I got mugged!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You okay?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (sitting down) Yah, because Phoebe knew the mugger!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (bewildered) How do you know a mugger?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm sorry I have friends outside the six of us.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You wanna know how she knew him? (He points at Phoebe) Because Phoebe used to mug people.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (shocked) Seriously?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I'm not proud of it, but, you know... sometimes when I was living on the street and I needed money for food and stuff I...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (disapproving) Phoebe, that is awful!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, ok, I wasn't rich like you guys, ok, I didn't eat gold and have a flying pony... I had a hard life, my mother was killed by a drug dealer...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're mother killed herself!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: She was a drug dealer!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, anyway, it was a good thing Phoebe knew the knew him, because (menacingly) I was about to do some serious damage!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (laughing) Okay...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, this must've brought back some really bad memories for you, Ross.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Why?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, Ross was mugged as a kid.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (worried) You were?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, it was pretty traumatic. I was outside St. Marc's Comics... you know, I-I-I was just there minding my own business, you know, seeing what kinda trouble spiderman got into that week-

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (coughing) Wonderwoman!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Anyway, I was heading towards this bakery, you know, to pick up a couple of dozen Linzer torts for someone... (He looks at Monica) ... when outta nowhere this thug with a pipe jumps out and says: "Gimme your money, punk!"

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (shocked) Oh my god...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know! And-and the worst part was they took my backpack which had all the original artwork I had done for my own comic book: "Science Boy"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh yeah! What was his superpower again?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A superhuman thirst for knowledge.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, I-I better get to class (He stands up) Are there any more of your friends I should look out for on my way, Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No... actually, you might wanna stay away from Jane street... that's where stabby Joe works.
Ross leaves Central Perk

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, I think we have a problem here.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, uhm, back in my mugging days, you know, I, uhm, I worked St. Marc's Comics.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, a pipe was my weapon of choice and, uhm, pre-teen comic book nerds were my meat.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: So?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, there was this one kid who had a sticker on his backpack that said-

lines.speaker: Phoebe and Monica
lines.text: "Geology rocks!"

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my god!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know... I mugged Ross!
Audition room, the producers and Lennart are waiting for Joey

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: You're late!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) I know, I'm sorry, but can I just have a quick second to run to the bathroom?

lines.speaker: Receptionist
lines.text: No, Lennart doesn't wait!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But I'm bursting with u-hu!

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: (spotting Joey) Joey! Here we go. Let's go very quickly!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Actually, I really need...

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: (interrupting) We must go now, quickly, please.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes... ahahaaa (He seems to be in pain)

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Ready? "What the hell are you still doing here?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (walking on the spot) "I think you know!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "Oh, you sick bastard!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "I am what you made me! You know what?"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "What?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "I could go right now."

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "Then go, go!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (urgent) "I, oh, I can't. I want to, but I can't!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Cut! That was good. (He turns to the producers) That was very good. You did everything I asked for.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (disbelieving) I did?

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Yes. Plus... what you've got that... I don't know what you've got going... this squirmy quality that you bring into the character that I couldn't've even imagined. Wow, hey, here's what we gonna do: come back tomorrow for the final callbacks with the ***, do all of this what you've got going now, but - you know what? - more, more. Can you do that?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure, yeah. I don't have time to say thank you because I really gotta go. (He grabs his jacket and limps out of the room)

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: (watching Joey leave) Look at that: still in character, I like it... I plant seeds I can't explain.
Monica and Chandler's Apartment, Chander sits on the couch as Monica and Rachel enter

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Putting on the sneakers... thought I'd get into a younger mindset, you know, to see if it sparked anything...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, anything yet?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, how's this: They're so uncomfortable it's like getting kicked in the nuts for your feet!
At that moment, Joey opens the door

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: Hey!
Joey heads straight for the fridge, takes all the beverage cans and is about to leave the apartment

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Probably wanna know what I'm doing...?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No, that seems about right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yesterday at my audition, I really had to pee, and apparently, having to pee makes me a really good actor. I got a call-back, so I'm drinking everything. Oh, by the way, that egg nog in our fridge was great!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, that was formula.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: We gotta get more of that. (He leaves the apartment)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sitting on the couch) You know what... these aren't half-bad! (to Rachel) You should suggest something like these to Ralph Lauren.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay, first of all, that's stupid and second of all, I'm not allowed to talk to Ralph.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Alright (He stands wearing the sneakers on) I feel youger already!
He trips and falls hard on his back

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (on the floor) Yah, I think I broke my hip.
Central Perk, Phoebe is there drinking coffee and Ross is about to enter

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (spotting Ross) Hey, you!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, how was class?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No one ever asked me that, what's wrong?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nothing, I really wanna know.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh... (He looks positively surprised) Well, uhm, there was actually a rather lively discussion about the Pleistocene...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (interrupting) Alright, nothing is worth this. Uhm, I have a confession to make... uhm, okay, you know, that girl that mugged you when you were a kid...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (disbelieving) Wh-What are you talking about? It wasn't a girl. It was this huge dude.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You don't have to lie anymore, Ross, I know that it was a fourteen year-old girl.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it wasn't.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yes, it was.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it wasn't. You don't think I would've defended myself against a fourteen year-old...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (interrupting, pinching his year) "Gimme your money, punk!"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (shocked) Oh my god, it was you! I can't believe it, you... you mugged me?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (apologetic) Yeah, and I'm so, so sorry, Ross, I'm sorry, but, you know, if you think about it, it's kinda neat. (She smiles at him, but he doesn't understand) I mean, well, it's just that I I've always felt kinda like an outsider, you know, the rest of you have these connections that go way back and, you know, now, you and I have... have a great one!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's not the best!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know, I'm sorry, please forgive me. I don't know what to say...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (indignant) There's nothing you can say. That was the most humiliating thing that ever happened to me.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Really? Even more humiliating than...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (interrupting) Hey, let's not do this!
He picks up his briefcase and walks out of the door, leaving Phoebe behind
Chandler's new workplace, we are witnessing a presentation of a fellow intern

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: ... and then, at the end of the commercial, the girls get out of the hut tub and start making out with each other!

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.text: (ironic) That's interesting! Just one thought: You didn't mention the shoes. Who's next? (Chandler raises his hand) Chander...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay... (He stands up) You start on the image of a guy putting on the shoes. He's about my age...

lines.speaker: Intern
lines.text: (snorting) Your age?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: A-huh. So he's rolling down the street and he starts to lose control, you know... maybe he falls... maybe hurts himself. Just then, a kid comes flying by wearing the shoes. He jumps over the old guy and laughs, and the line reads: "Not suitable for adults!"

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.text: Chandler, that's great!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, thank you, sir... or man-who's-two-years-younger-than-me (He sits down again)

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.text: You see? That has a clear selling point. It appeals to our key demographic, it's.... (enthusiastic) You did you come up with that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (over-enthusiastic) I don't know, I don' I don' know! I was just trying to get into a young mindset, you know, and it just started to flow.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.text: That is great. Good work!
Chandler. Thank you.

lines.speaker: Boss
lines.text: See all of you tomorrow. (He leaves)
Chandler stands up and walks out the room with a cane

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The cold weather hurts my hip!
Central Perk, Ross sits in a chair as Phoebe enters

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey, Ross! (He lowers his newspaper and scowls at her) I know you're still mad at me, but can I just talk to you for a second?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sure, go ahead. Whoops, sorry, sure, go ahead. (He raises his hands as if being mugged)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I just really wanted to apologize again and... and also show you something I think you'll find very exciting.
She puts a box on her lap, labelled "crap from the street"

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (faking enthusiasm) Oh my god, crap from the street? (She smiles excitedly, but Ross just turns back to his newspaper)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Look, Ross, in this box are all the things I got from mugging that I thought were too special to sell... or smoke. (Ross looks at her in astonishment) Anyway, I was looking through it and I found "Science Boy" (She holds up some sheets of paper and hands them to Ross)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh my god. (He sighs) I never thought I'd see this again. (He browses trough the pages) It's all here. What made you save it all these years?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I can't say, I just thought it was really good... and... maybe would be worth something some day.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You really thought "Science Boy" was worth saving!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah... but you should know, I also have a jar of vaseline and a cat skull in here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Still... this is amazing... Oh my god, thank you, Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're welcome. And thank you for "Science Boy". I learned a lot from him

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You're welcome.
Audition room, Joey and Lennart are rehearsing

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (hoping frantically on the spot, screaming) "I need an answer!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "I-I-I can't tell you somethin' I don't know."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "You know!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "I don't know!"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "I need an answer now!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "Alright, here, you want an answer... the answer... is..."
He pauses while Joey struggles to avoid wetting his pants

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (screaming) Oh!

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: "She never loved me, she only loved you."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: "You knew this all along and you never told me? You never told me? I can never forgive you, I can never forgive myself, I have nothing to live for - Bang - End Scene!"

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Absolutely amazing! (The producers applaud Joey) The part is yours.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (in pain) Oh thanks, thanks! Now, I really have to get...

lines.speaker: Lennart
lines.text: Wa-wa-wa-wait! Congratulations! You did it! You did it! (He hugs Joey) You can relax now. Yeah.
Joey relaxes and wets his pants while hugging Lennart
Closing Credits
Monica and Chandler's Apartment, Monica sits at the table reading the mail

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wow, that's a big cable bill! Huh, you don't have a job, but you have no problem ordering porn... on a Saturday afternoon?! (shocked) I was in the house!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey, uhm, Phoebe didn't by any chance mention that...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ... that she was the huge guy that mugged you? Yah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I see. You didn't happen to tell...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: ... everybody we know? Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Great. Thanks! (He leaves)
End
